query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN isVisible = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visible, SUM(CASE WHEN isVisible = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hidden FROM receipt_reviews;
